definitions.text: The status or condition of something
examples: The used bookshop wouldn’t offer much due to the poor shape of the book.

definitions.text: Condition of personal health, especially muscular health.
examples: The vet checked to see what kind of shape the animal was in.
We exercise to keep in good physical shape.

definitions.text: A graphical representation of an object's form or its external boundary, outline, or external surface.
examples: What shape shall we use for the cookies? Stars, circles, or diamonds?
Earth was shapen by God for God's folk.

definitions.text: To give something a shape and definition.
examples: Shape the dough into a pretzel. For my art project, I plan to shape my clay lump into a bowl.

definitions.text: To form or manipulate something into a certain shape.
